title: Torchified
description: Transforms torches to 3D when held, keeping the classic 2D look in the inventory and hotbar.
body:
![Torchified logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a8a498669a8758c3761a5c70fbceeac269d046f.png)

<center> Torchified enhances torches in Minecraft by transforming them into a 3D model when held, 
while still displaying the classic 2D sprite in your inventory. This resource pack provides a fresh look while maintaining the familiar torch design you know.

‎ 
‎ 
‎ 
‎ 

![soul torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff7bf28ee94f5b842ae8cfaa1f418353a351004.gif)
![Torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf9faf17568b62ecc9be49b850db27c6f55f7c45.gif)
![Redstone torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8282afdcff49be7ddd3c524546e0b9e0ae7bd02e.gif)
</center>

# Features
  - Keeps torches 2D as an item 
  - Makes torches 3D when held and in Item frame or when Armor Stand holds it 
  - Animated flame when held
  - Emmisive textures!
  - Compatible with "Not Enough Animations"



# **‎Credits:**

The flame texture: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-flame-particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-flame-particles)

## Terms of use
With this recourcepack, **_YOU MAY_** (only with proper credit):

- Include Torchified in your modpack or server
- Modify for _personal_ use
  
With this resource pack, _**YOU MAY NOT**_:
- Redistribute this resource pack
